mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.visible = 1 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.sort ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_menu WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted = 0 AND (#{menuId} IS NULL OR id != #{menuId})
